lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Yo, techie, what’s going on here?

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Alright, how do I stop this?

lines.speaker: Injured Scientist
lines.text: ...there is...a switch...other side...of large room...need to flip it...will reset the matrix...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Alright, you stay here, that seems easy enough...

lines.speaker: Injured Scientist
lines.text: WAIT! That room...is leaking...radiation everywhere...would kill you if you just walked across it...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: So how the hell am I supposed to get to the other side?

lines.speaker: Injured Scientist
lines.text: ...some panels...are safe…others...too much radiation...you must only walk on...safe panels...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: How do I know which panels are safe and which aren’t?

lines.speaker: Injured Scientist
lines.text: ...check…the monitor...should have...radiation heat map...also…take this...hands Macklin a Geiger Transporter...this…will teleport you…back into safe room...should you step on…wrong panel...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Wow, we definitely didn’t have this technology when I worked this job...
